How's it going everyone? In this video we're going to cover setting up your Acuity Scheduling account. Now we are going to include a link below this video to Acuity. Just click on that button and it should take you right to AcuityScheduling.com. You notice that has that extra text afterwards that lets you know you clicked the right link. Once you get to this Acuity page, you want to go and type in the email address you want to use. I'm going to choose a good password. You do have to agree to the terms of service, so click that check mark. Make sure you review those and you agree with them. I've already reviewed them. I'm comfortable with it, so I'm going to go and create my account by clicking the screen button. If you want to, you can save your password. I'm choosing not to. It's going to ask you what the name of your business is. It has a trial. It's going to be set up to February 22nd. We're going to show you where you can upgrade to. You do want to upgrade because it gives you access to more calendars and more settings. It's super important to do. Business name is going to be your business name. You want to click on this drop-down arrow and you can choose what you want as far as your industry. They have a few different types here. We have fitness. They have a CrossFit gym. Just look through this list and find whichever one fits the best for you. I'm going to choose fitness. What's your name? I'm going to go and put in my name. Now if you want other people to be able to access this and manage these appointments, you can click add another person there and it'll let you type in their information. I'm going to remove it for now, but that's another place you can get that set up. Once you get your information in there, if you've added it to other people and you have their information, go ahead and click this green button. Let's go. Now it has a walk through and you do want to complete this walk through step by step. So the first thing is to set up your calendar availability. A couple options that we want to go through on this. If you notice that has my name here, if you have entered in more than one name at that process, it's going to give you more than one calendar to set the availability for. So for your main calendar, you probably want to set it to have regular hours every week. That means that those hours are going to repeat every week. You don't have to go in and set each individual day. So I'm going to go and enter in the hours. Now if you notice it puts on two rows. I'm going to delete this out. I'm going to put 8 a.m. to 3 p.m. I'm going to hit return to go to a new line and do 4 p.m. to 8 p.m. You can do multiple. You can make sure you leave yourself blocks if you have scheduled classes or times where you take lunch or picking up the kids. This is where you can put those gaps in there to make sure nobody's scheduling an appointment during the times that you can't be available for them. Just delete everything that's out of that box and it sets it to close. Once you have your availability done, you can look down here to override specific hours. So say you know that your hours are going to be different on the 22nd. You can click on that and you can change those. So say you're only going to be open from 3 to 7 on those hours. So hit that green set hours and you notice it changes it for just that one day and it makes it bold. That lets you know you're good to go. I'm going to go and hit the screen save regular hours button. And you notice once I hit that save, I updated it there. That's what you want to see. So always make sure once you set your regular hours to save them. But since we did a specific day, it didn't override it. So just to go over that, you set your regular hours. Those are the hours that you're going to be available most days of every week. You can put in different time blocks to make sure that you have time free for what you need to do. If you don't want to be available on a day, you delete what's in that box. And then if you want to override on specific days, look for the calendar below and you can use these arrows to go to different months. And you can set specific days hours. You can always come back in here and change us later on. It's not permanent by any means, but it's a really good in scheduling limits right there. This is something that's very important. Plain scheduling limits allows you to do appointments per time slot. So if you want to allow a set number of appointments per time slot, so you want to allow double or triple booking, this is where you can set those limits. You can also choose a maximum number of appointments. So you can choose until fully booked or accept a maximum number. So up to three hours per day or six appointments per day or 30 appointments per week. Once you set those limits to whatever you want, go ahead and hit that save limits button. No confirm it there for you. Now if you want to add more calendars, so say you're doing this for more than one person, then do add new calendar. Normally you don't need to do this because we're going to show you when you need to create a new calendar for a play. This is more for your personal use if you're going to embrace security. I'm going to scroll back up here. We've already set our calendar, create our appointment types. So I'm going to go ahead and click on create appointment types. So appointment types are the actual appointments that people are choosing, and your appointment types are going to be associated with one or more calendars. So if you have one calendar that's specific for onboarding or for a specific play, generally you're going to create a new appointment for that as well. So I'm going to go and do a new type of service just as an example. You're going to choose whatever you want the name to be. So this will be new lead. You can choose how long you want to book it for. If you leave this at $0 it's not going to show any price to your clients. If you put a number in there it's going to show a price to it. So if you're advertising and you put a price in there and you're sending them to your acuity scheduling in some way, it's probably going to make sure some of your leads don't get to you. So don't change the price unless you're sure you know what you want to do there. As far as picture, whenever somebody goes to schedule an appointment for the specific appointment type, this is a picture it's going to show above. So normally you want to do something like your gym logo or if you have a picture for the specific challenge or weigh in. Private means that only admins and clients who have the direct scheduling link are able to book it. So if you're sharing that direct scheduling link and we'll cover that later on, you can choose private. Public is normally what you want to do. That way you're not restricting yourself. Go and hit that create appointment type. We've created our appointment type. We're good to go there. I'm going to go and click on this customize your client scheduling page and this allows you to choose what it looks like whenever they pull it up and you see a preview over here. You can do expand preview to see a bigger picture or close preview to close it. You can also have view live and that's going to open a new window with your actual appointment scheduler. That way you can see it and test it out. I'm going to close that tab by clicking that X and come back here. We're going to do business. Let's go and give it a logo. We've chosen our logo. You can type in whatever you want there if you know where it puts that text. Right below your business name. I'm going to go and close the preview. You can choose when your week starts. So if you'd like it to start on Monday instead of Sunday you can choose that. You see now it shows on Monday and it does Monday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday and it doesn't show Tuesday because when we set our availability for Tuesday we deleted what was in there. If they want to see more times they can click that button to go and close the preview. Normally you don't need to change the AMPM sometimes that 24-hour does confuse people. Language is probably going to be English. Now time zone this is something that's very important. You do want to set this to your time zone. I'm in central time so I'm going to choose central. That way when clients look at it it's going to show them that they're getting it at the right time. They don't have to guess. Now if say you're booking appointments in a different time zone then that may be a bit more complicated and that's what that check mark is level four. But generally anybody in your area that's coming to your gym is going to be your and if you want to change the font you can change the font to whatever you'd like. For the button accent color this is just going to be kind of the highlight so I'm going to go and change it to blue so you can see what that looks like. So now we have blue there and blue there. I like blue it's my favorite color but you can choose whatever color you like. So we have a few different options here. You can change the wording so if you want to change the wording that they're going to see you can click that button and start changing it. Now this gets a little more complex. You don't have to do this process but you can play around if you want. But interact with site lets you actually come in here and make changes to it. I recommend leaving this kind of on your own but if you notice like we can click on your information change it to whatever you want and then once you hit submit it's going to change it right there. Once that's done once you've made all the changes you want just hit that X to close out and it'll keep those. So again changing wording is to go in there and change the actual wording of the labels. You don't have to do that if you don't want to but it does give you more customization for it. There are some scheduling page options. Generally you want to uncheck schedule another appointment. I recommend requiring a phone number so that way you are always getting their phone number. Now some client some people do like to let their clients create an account with acuity for your calendar that way they're able to log in and see their appointments and make changes later. It's up to you. A lot of people don't want clients to be able to make those changes or see that. That way removes confusion especially if you're giving them other logins. You don't want them to have four or five six logins just for your gym. That's what that disable is there for. So appointment list type. Generally you want to leave that as far as the duration but you can hide it if you want to. Duration just lets them know how long that you probably want to hide it but if you're scheduling them for something more realistic like 15 or 30 minutes you can leave that unchecked. One option you always want to change is this disable recurring appointments. Put a checkmark next to that. That's going to stop clients from being able to accidentally pick more than one appointment time and take up more than one slot and that also means that they would have more than one appointment reminder and it can cause no shows or confusion so it's always best to make sure you have a checkmark next to disable recurring appointments. One option you don't see right here is appointment type list hide price and the reason why that's not there yet is because we haven't created an appointment type yet. All that option does is it hides the price associated with the appointment from the appointment screen. If you are assigning prices to your appointments you can come back here, you can put a checkmark next to that after you create an appointment type with a price. It's going to make sure that they actually won't see that price on the screen especially if you're only using it for internal accounting but normally you don't have to worry about that option. The last one is this collapse categories. Normally it's going to show multiple categories if you have packages or diff certificates or different different subscriptions. We normally don't use that so you normally don't have to worry about that checkbox. So again the main two ones are require phone number and disable recurring appointments and then you may also want to go ahead and enable this client disable client login and registration. So just a quick rundown of this one more time. The template leave it on daily that means it's the best to show them the times coming up right away. If you do monthly it can sometimes allow them to book too far in advance and that means it can drop your show rate. Make sure you do your business name and your logo. You can put in scheduling instructions, change what time the week starts on, make sure you set your time zone and then if you want to you can change the font, you can change the color, you can change the wording. I'm going to go ahead and hit and it does give you a successful it's changed everything. And just to go through those options really the only one I recommend you always have is this require phone number. Once that's done you can choose to sync with other calendars. So if you use Google Calendar or iCloud or Office 365 or Exchange or Outlook you can set it up to where that's automatically going to sync. So that's a great way if you have an Android phone and you want to make sure that you're signed in to that same Android account on your phone so you get those calendar appointments you can do that if you want to. If you use an iCloud you can do the same thing for your Apple phone it's really your personal preference you don't have to sync the account if you don't want to. So now that we're done with this process we can go ahead and close this out by hitting that four core steps. So you can skip this step don't set up syncing. More options here if you want to. Normally we aren't going to have you use these features as part of the plays so you don't have to worry about that now if you don't want to. Once it's done though you can go ahead and close out that walkthrough and you've set up the majority of your settings here. I'm going to give you a brief rundown of Acuity's main pages so if you click on appointments there it's going to take you to the appointments calendar and this is going to show you all your upcoming appointments. If you notice they give us a test appointment. You can change between today, week, or month so that shows your monthly view. Today shows just today. Week shows the entire week. Go ahead and click on that appointment and see it shows the people who signed up their name, their phone number, their email. This one does have a payment associated with it. That's something we chose specifically not to do by leaving the price zero so you normally won't see that there. You can put in notes about the appointment so if you want to put in notes about the appointment or about the client you can see that right there so that way you have something quick to take a look at. If you need to cancel an appointment you can hit that cancel right there. You can also reschedule, even edit this so if you need to edit their name or phone number you can make those changes. You can change the appointment type and hit save. That's normally all you really need to do as far as getting your appointment calendar set up. Let's go ahead and head through some of the other sections so client list shows everybody who's creating an account with a QT or entered in their information with a QT. As you start getting more appointments this will show up and have more people in here. Reports is just a quick way of getting information on people who do sign up, number of appointments. You can dig into this more on your own. Import, export, that's how you can either import a whole bunch of clients to a QT. So you have an export from your CRM and you want to make sure their information is already in there. You can go and import them if you want to export it so say you have a bunch of clients in here that you want to take out of a QT and maybe use somewhere else you can export it here too. Client scheduling page. Now this is something that's a bit different. This main link here allows them to schedule it for any point so I'm going to go and click this link and show you what it does. They're able to actually choose their appointment type. They're able to choose it so normally that's going to give them access to them so we almost never use these. Direct link and embedding again that's for everything in here and you notice it gives you these little walkthroughs so you can use these if you want. I'm just closing them out so they don't get in our way. You can customize the appearance and this is that same process that we went through. Notice it's still giving us these little pop-ups. I'm just clicking through them so that way they don't pop up and interfere. Now if you have somebody who does a lot of web program or coding they can use this right away. You don't need to use it though. Now business settings this is where you can set that availability. Your default schedule, your client scheduling limits and it shows all of your calendars. Appointment types is where you'll see all of your appointments and you can make new appointment types there. Intake forms are forms that you can include with acuity. We normally are going to use woofoo forms for this but if you want to explore this on your own you're more than welcome to. Now here is our package and gift certificates and subscriptions. Now this is also a good opportunity to upgrade it. You can also use this upgrade at the top as long as you're on a trial account. What I do recommend with acuity is at the very least go with the growing business plan. The growing business plan is going to allow you to have six different calendars. It unlocks a lot of the advance and it allows you to do text messaging so you can have it automatically text message you when somebody creates an appointment and you can also do some other appointment packages and gift certificates with it if you want to. The main features that we use as part of the growing business are the six calendars. The six calendars are super important that means you can have one calendar per person, one calendar per trainer, you can have two calendars for one play and two calendars for another. With a free plan when you've chosen the plan and again I recommend that growing business click on upgrade and it's going to have you enter in this information. Go ahead and enter in all your billing information and then click upgrade and you'll be back up to that growing business and then a trial banner will disappear. Now if you included other people into your account that's under business settings manage users so if you have other people that you want to be able to log into acuity and use it this is where you can set that up. Integrations is where you can have it connect with other software. You really won't need to use this very often probably nothing with our plans but occasionally we may use something like Xavier and we'll show you when you do need to do that but they do have quite a few integrations. The sync with other calendars is where you can have it connect with your other calendars. Payment settings is where you can manage your billing information. Email settings is where you can set up your emails so you can set it to where it's going to send an email to people whenever they sign up either the initial reminder cancellation or reschedule follow-up. It's up to you if you want to set this up it does come with a premade template it's interesting to use. You can also click on my account down here at the bottom and this is where you can change your main business settings so there's your business name your time zone your email you can choose if it's going to send appointment notifications to you. You can choose your sidebar color if you want a different color there and this is also another place where you can upgrade. In case you ever want to go through that walkthrough so you accidentally closed it you can click this show walkthrough that's under my account show walkthrough and it's going to take you right back to that walkthrough that we went through. So we walked through creating an account use the link that's below this video to get to a QD sign up your account you want to go through all four of these main steps and then I recommend it some things as you need to otherwise that's it I'm sorry this video was so long there was just a lot to cover in it. The QD is a very complex program it shows you a lot of really great scheduling tools. I hope you enjoyed this video and I hope you enjoyed the next ones.
